title: Restrepiopsis viridula
taxonomy: Restrepiopsis viridula is a species of orchid, and it belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This family is commonly known as the orchid family and consists of approximately 30,000 to 40,000 species. Restrepiopsis viridula, as a member of the Orchidaceae family, is further classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Restrepieae. The genus Restrepiopsis is a part of the subtribe Restrepieinae. The classification of Restrepiopsis viridula is an important aspect of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships within the orchid family.
